Online serving benchmark has several metrics which are calculated but not exported to the results JSONL file. These can be helpful for analysis.

sglang.title: [Bugfix] Fix embedding model hangs with `--enable-metrics`
sglang.author: CatherineSue
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

The embedding model fails after the first embedding request with --enable-metrics because TokenizerManager tries to check for recv_obj.completion_tokens and state.obj.stream, which BatchEmbeddingOut and EmbeddingReqInput doesn't have. As a result, the first /encode request is able to go

sglang.title: [Bugfix] Fix bug in fork logic caused by null text_
sglang.author: Muqi1029
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
As indicated in issue #2755, forking the state before submitting any string causes a backend crash. This occurs because the frontend executes a null SglCommitLazy, with the null text causing the backend to crash.
Modifications
I added extra logic to the fork process. The new logic checks

sglang.title: Fix port number overflow
sglang.author: gty111
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

When serving with large port number
python -m sglang.launch_server --model-path meta-llama/Meta-Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct \
--port 65531 --host 0.0.0.0

it will trigger following error
Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "/miniconda3/envs/sglang/lib/python3.10/runpy.py", line 196, in _

sglang.title: [Eagle2]Fix multiple concurrent request crashes
sglang.author: coolhok
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
fix some Eagle2 some bug

hidden_states interference between multiple concurrent requests,in func (prepare_for_decode).
Multiple concurrent occurrences have a certain probability of crashing.when req1 is finished,req2 is comming.in func (merge_batch).
Multiple concurrent, add func filter_

sglang.title: Cache controller for hierarchical caching
sglang.author: xiezhq-hermann
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
This is one of the breakdown PR of the hierarchical caching proposal.
Modifications

Cache controller connects memory pool and hierarchical radix tree. Major controller logics are moved to hierarchical radix tree implementation compared to the initial proposal, making the controller light

vllm.title: [optimization] remove python function call for custom activation op
vllm.author: cennn
vllm.bodyExcerpt: remove abundant custom activation op written in python

vllm.title: [platform] support pytorch custom op pluggable
vllm.author: wangxiyuan
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Allow register platform specified forward function by users.
Related to: #11162
How to use:
In an out-of-tree plugin repo(for example, the npu device):
from vllm.model_executor.layers.layernorm import RMSNorm

def forward_npu(self, x, residual):
     # implementation
     ...

RMSNorm.forward_oot =

vllm.title: Replace "online inference" with "online serving"
vllm.author: hmellor
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR replaces all references to online inference with online serving to consolidate the terminology in the docs. As discussed in #sig-docs on Slack.

vllm.title: [Doc] [1/N] Initial guide for merged multi-modal processor
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR adds basic documentation about the merged multi-modal processor and how to implement a subclass for individual models.
I have removed all documentation pages relating to the outdated input mapper and (standalone) processor.

vllm.title: [platform] support custom torch.compile backend key
vllm.author: wangxiyuan
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Allow platform to specify its own torch.compile backend key.
This PR helps to make the common module more platform agnostic.
Related to RFC: #11162

vllm.title: [Doc] Rename offline inference examples
vllm.author: hmellor
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Rename all offline inference examples starting with offline_ or offline_inference_ since that information is now contained in the path to the file.

vllm.title: [Docs] Fix docstring in `get_ip` function
vllm.author: KuntaiDu
vllm.bodyExcerpt: A space is missing in the docstring of get_ip function in utils.py.

vllm.title: [Doc] Docstring fix in `benchmark_long_document_qa_throughput.py`
vllm.author: KuntaiDu
vllm.bodyExcerpt: The command in the example does not use the CPU offloading feature and thus does not require 50GB CPU memory. Remove the incorrect description.

PR #9929  change benchmark_prefix_caching.py "--input-length-range" from default value to "required=True".

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Check that number of images matches number of <|image|> tokens with mllama
vllm.author: tjohnson31415
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The OpenAI server can be crashed when serving the Llama Vision Instruct models if the request contains more <|image|> tokens than images. This can be triggered if the user message includes the <|image|> special token that is non-adjacent to the image message, eg.:
curl http://localhost:8000/v1/chat/

vllm.title: [mypy] Fix mypy warnings in api_server.py
vllm.author: frreiss
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR fixes the mypy warnings in the file vllm/entrypoints/openai/api_server.py. I added some type hints and marked imported ASGI middleware classes with #type: ignore.
Part of #3680

vllm.title: [ci] fix broken distributed-tests-4-gpus
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Lots of ci failures for this test, and I can locally reproduce.
The test expects to fail, since it has with pytest.raises .
However, it only expects openai.APIConnectionError, while we see in the ci that it actually raises openai.InternalServerError
cc @robertgshaw2-neuralmagic how we differentiate

Summary
#9565
#11126

disable norm: Removed input layer normalization and output normalization.
add residual: Added a residual path at the end of the Llama model. This was omitted because output normalization was disabled in the first step.
